Class ReforgeApplier

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.reforge.ReforgeApplier
public class ReforgeApplier extends Object
Handles the application and removal of reforges from items. Uses the MMOItems data-driven API: LiveMMOItem + StatData + build(). Implements strict NBT tracking to ensuring only reforge-specific data is wiped.

    • ReforgeApplier

  • Method Details

    • isReforgeable

      public boolean isReforgeable(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks if an item is eligible for reforging. Requirements: 1. Must be a valid MMOItems item 2. Must have REFORGEABLE stat set to true (or not set, defaults to true)
      Parameters:
      item - The item to check
      Returns:
      true if the item can be reforged, false otherwise

    • getReforgeId

      public String getReforgeId(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)

    • getNotReforgeableReason

      public String getNotReforgeableReason(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Gets the reason why an item cannot be reforged.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to check
      Returns:
      Message key for the error reason, or null if item is reforgeable

    • applyReforge

      public boolean applyReforge(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, Reforge reforge, String itemType)
